- raiser → proposed(exactor)
  - NEW: Then shall stand up in his estate one that shall cause an exactor to pass through the glory of the kingdom: but within few days he shall be destroyed, neither in anger, nor in battle.

## Isaiah 24:2
- borrower → debtor, giver → him that giveth, lender → man, taker → usurer
  - NEW: And it shall be, as with the people, so with the priest; as with the servant, so with his master; as with the maid, so with her mistress; as with the buyer, so with the seller; as with him that lendeth, so with the debtor; as with the usurer, so with him that giveth usury to him.

  - NEW: They break cockatrice' eggs, and weave the spider's web: he that eateth of their eggs dieth, and that which is crushed breaketh out into a viper.
